name: yanimt
documentation:
# Yanimt

Yet ANother IMpacket Tool

Gather infos from active directory and visualize it from your terminal

# Installation


```
# System wide
pipx install yanimt

# In a venv
pip install yanimt

# Directly from source
pipx install git+https://github.com/Headorteil/yanimt
```

# Doc
Check the [cli doc](https://github.com/Headorteil/yanimt/blob/main/docs/cli.md)

![TUI 1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Headorteil/yanimt/refs/heads/main/images/TUI-1.png)

![TUI 2](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/Headorteil/yanimt/refs/heads/main/images/TUI-2.png)

> NOTE : You can select text from the tui by pressing the shift key in most terminals

# DEV
## Set up env

Install poetry and poetry-up

```bash
poetry shell
poetry install
pre-commit install
```

## Debug

In 2 terms :

`textual console`

`textual run --dev -c yanimt`

# TODO

- Follow these issues :

    - https://github.com/fastapi/typer/issues/347

- Do things

modules.name: yanimt
documentation:
Yanimt package.

This package provides classes to query AD infos, displaying it...

functions.name: yanimt.cli.main

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--version",
            "-V",
            callback=__version_callback,
            is_eager=True,
            help="Print the tool version",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--config",
            "-c",
            file_okay=True,
            readable=True,
            resolve_path=True,
            help="Config path",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--display/--no-display",
            " /-D",
            help="Display things that are not logs nor live like tables",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--pager/--no-pager",
            "-p/-P",
            help="Display things that are not logs nor live like tables in less",
        )

documentation: Set variables for all subcommands and run TUI if no command is provided.

functions.name: yanimt.cli.gather.main

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--username",
            "-u",
            help="Username to connect with",
            show_default=False,
            rich_help_panel="Authentication",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--password",
            "-p",
            help="Password to connect with",
            show_default=False,
            rich_help_panel="Authentication",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--ask-password",
            "-P",
            help="Ask for a password",
            rich_help_panel="Authentication",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--hashes",
            "-H",
            help="NTLM hashes, format is LMHASH:NTHASH",
            show_default=False,
            rich_help_panel="Authentication",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--auth-proto",
            help="Use Kerberos or NTLM authentication. If auto, it try with NTLM then with kerberos",
            rich_help_panel="Authentication",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--aes-key",
            "-a",
            help="AES key to use for Kerberos Authentication (128 or 256 bits)",
            show_default=False,
            rich_help_panel="Authentication",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--ccache-path",
            "-c",
            exists=True,
            file_okay=True,
            readable=True,
            resolve_path=True,
            help="Path of the ccache. If ommited and no other authentification method is supplied, it checks KRB5CCNAME env var",
            show_default=False,
            autocompletion=complete_path,
            rich_help_panel="Authentication",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--domain",
            "-d",
            help="Domain to query. If ommited, it checks --dc-ip, --dh-host or resolv.conf",
            show_default=False,
            rich_help_panel="Connection",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--dc-ip",
            "-i",
            help="IP address of the domain controller. If ommited it checks the --dc-host, --domain",
            show_default=False,
            rich_help_panel="Connection",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--dc-host",
            help="Hostname of the domain controller. If ommited it checks the --dc-ip or --domain",
            show_default=False,
            rich_help_panel="Connection",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--ldap-scheme",
            "-l",
            help="Ldap scheme. If auto, it try ldap then ldaps",
            rich_help_panel="Connection",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--dns-ip",
            "-D",
            help="DNS IP. If ommited, it try with DC IP",
            show_default=False,
            rich_help_panel="Connection",
        )

typer.Option(
            "--dns-proto",
            help="DNS protocol. If auto, it try UDP tne TCP",
            rich_help_panel="Connection",
        )

documentation: Gather all needed information from the Active Directory.

params.name:
typer.Option(
            "--resolve/--no-resolve",
            "-r/-R",
            help="Resolve the DNS name of the machines",
        )

documentation: Create child widgets for the app.
